user.title: Green Button Energy Import
user.description:
Click Submit to set up the Green Button Energy Import integration.

After setup, a **Green Button Import** panel will appear in your sidebar where you can drag and drop your downloaded CSV or XML files to import your usage data, and billing CSVs to import monthly cost data.

Supported utilities: RG&E, NYSEG, Central Maine Power, United Illuminating, Connecticut Natural Gas, Southern Connecticut Gas, and Berkshire Gas.

abort.already_configured: Green Button Energy Import is already configured.
